instruction: Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity terminology.
input: An issue found in NetScout nGeniusOne v.6.3.4 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code and cause a denial of service via a crafted file.
output: A vulnerability in NetScout nGeniusOne version 6.3.4 enables a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code and initiate a denial of service (DoS) through a specially crafted file.
